prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia weighs several data-source cards on a balance scale. Cards show tradeoffs: "快但没复权", "免费但不稳", "稳定但要钱", "小众可用". The scale is not declaring a winner; it shows tradeoff thinking.

Core meaning: each stock data source has different cost, speed, quality, and maintenance tradeoffs.

Style: clean editorial Chinese blog illustration, black/red/white, small blue check and warning marks, lots of empty space. Minimal labels: "速度", "质量", "成本", "维护".

Avoid dense comparison table, avoid brand logos, avoid financial advice.
